headers.value: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; img-src 'self' data: blob: https://storage.googleapis.com https://images.unsplash.com; font-src 'self' data: https://fonts.gstatic.com; connect-src 'self'; frame-src https://www.youtube.com https://www.youtube-nocookie.com; frame-ancestors 'none'; base-uri 'self'; form-action 'self'; object-src 'none'; upgrade-insecure-requests
